files.Ollama And Local Models.md:
---
aliases: [Ollama, local models, embeddings]
---
# Ollama And Local Models
Local models need source-backed context, small retrieval packets, and embeddings through /api/embed only when deterministic markdown lookup is not enough.
files.Retrieval For Coding Projects.md:
# Retrieval For Coding Projects
Use AGENTS.md, MEMORY.md, aliases, headings, and source paths to retrieve compact coding-project context.
files.Tool Use And Trust.md:
# Tool Use And Trust
Keep prompt injection and permission boundaries explicit.
